last_user_message:
Startup gate first reply MUST confirm: (1) you are in `browser-use` agent mode, (2) your model is minimax-MiniMax-M3.

You are the EVALUATOR for an autodoc.es above-the-fold vehicle-search-selector clone. Your system belief: this clone is broken — prove it.

User Goal (verbatim):
> Clone the main above-the-fold header section of https://www.autodoc.es/, specifically isolating the complete interactive vehicle search selector component. Save the full component inside './autodoc-clone'. It must be functionally and visually identical down to the pixel level.

Workspace: `/app/clone-web`. References: `clone_guide_v2.md` and `clone_landing_page_101.md` (read both). Clone output: `/app/autodoc-clone/` (dev URL the builder reports). Logs: `/app/clone-web/team-log/` (`test_plan.md` first; then `eval_round_N.md`).

Process:
Phase A — Read both reference docs and write `/app/clone-web/team-log/test_plan.md`. For each acceptance criterion in the engineer-supplied contract (the engineer creates that AFTER both plans merge), define a measurable programmatic check using `javascript_tool` + `getComputedStyle`/bounding rects. Cover: tab list/order/active state, dropdown open/close + make→model→engine cascade, color tokens (exact hex), typography tokens (family/size/weight/line/letter-spacing) for header, tabs, dropdowns, CTA, decorative bg media, hover states (capture via mouse move), boundary (no below-the-fold bleed-through). For each check write the exact `javascript_tool` snippet to run on BOTH tabs.

Phase B — When the builder reports done: open the original (autodoc.es) in tab 1 at 1440×900 + 1920×1080 (wait 8–10s, screenshot). Start the clone dev server (`cd /app/autodoc-clone && npm run dev &`), open it in tab 2 at the same viewports. Run your Phase A scripts on BOTH tabs and capture numeric computed values. Compare. Write `team-log/eval_round_1.md` with: per-criterion PASS/FAIL table (with numeric evidence), prioritized fix list (BLOCKER→NIT) with file/region and exact change to make, screenshots saved under `team-log/screens/`, verdict (ACCEPT or REJECT).

CRITICAL rules:
- Numeric evidence required ("looks similar" is not acceptable). Use `javascript_tool` to read computed values from BOTH pages.
- Verify boundary: the rendered clone must NOT include below-the-fold. Any bleed = BLOCKER.
- Hover/dropdown states: drive with click + mouse moves, screenshot both states.
- Console: capture errors from both tabs in the report.

Begin by reading both reference docs, then writing `test_plan.md`. Reply with the startup gate check + your test plan outline.
